hero.title: Ship UI copy without routing every change through engineering
hero.description: This Vite app loads translation JSON files at runtime with i18next. The same files can be edited by translators in Weblate.

languages.title: Switch locale
languages.description: A translator can change these labels in Weblate and the app will pick them up from the JSON files.

sample.title: Strings translators usually own
sample.intro: Each block below maps to nested JSON keys that Weblate understands.

release.title: Release banner
release.body: Version {{version}} is ready for customer review.

support.title: Support notice
support.body: Need help? Reach our team in under {{hours}} business hours.

checkout.title: Checkout message
checkout.body_zero: No items in your cart yet.
checkout.body_one: You have {{count}} item ready to purchase.
checkout.body_other: You have {{count}} items ready to purchase.

weblate.title: Recommended Weblate component
weblate.description: Use the repository root as the component source and point Weblate at the locale files below.
